kilauea_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY VOLCANO ACTIVITY NOTIFICATION
kilauea_notices.message: HVO Kilauea ORANGE/WATCH - Precursory low-level eruptive activity before episode 51 of the ongoing Halemaʻumaʻu eruption began around 2:51 p.m. HST on July 14. Low level winds out of the NE, higher level winds are variable.

mauna_loa_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY MONTHLY UPDATE
mauna_loa_notices.message: HVO Haleakala GREEN/NORMAL - No activity of concern for Haleakalā.
